mapper.select: SELECT c.*, CASE WHEN c.user1_id = #{userId} THEN u2.username ELSE u1.username END AS other_username, CASE WHEN c.user1_id = #{userId} THEN u2.avatar ELSE u1.avatar END AS other_avatar, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message m WHERE m.conversation_id = c.id AND m.sender_id != #{userId} AND m.is_read = 0) AS unread_count FROM conversation c LEFT JOIN user u1 ON c.user1_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON c.user2_id = u2.id WHERE (c.user1_id = #{userId} OR c.user2_id = #{userId}) AND NOT (c.user1_id = #{userId} AND c.user1_deleted = 1) AND NOT (c.user2_id = #{userId} AND c.user2_deleted = 1) ORDER BY COALESCE(c.last_time, c.create_time) DESC

SELECT * FROM conversation WHERE ( (user1_id = #{user1Id} AND user2_id = #{user2Id}) OR (user1_id = #{user2Id} AND user2_id = #{user1Id}) )
AND item_type = #{itemType} AND item_id = #{itemId}
AND item_type IS NULL AND item_id IS NULL
LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation(user1_id, user2_id, item_type, item_id, last_message, last_time, create_time, updated_at) VALUES(#{user1Id}, #{user2Id}, #{itemType}, #{itemId}, #{lastMessage}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_time = #{lastTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message m JOIN conversation c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE (c.user1_id = #{userId} OR c.user2_id = #{userId}) AND m.sender_id != #{userId} AND m.is_read = 0 AND NOT (c.user1_id = #{userId} AND c.user1_deleted = 1) AND NOT (c.user2_id = #{userId} AND c.user2_deleted = 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET user1_deleted = CASE WHEN user1_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE user1_deleted END, user2_deleted = CASE WHEN user2_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE user2_deleted END WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM conversation WHERE id = #{id} AND user1_deleted = 1 AND user2_deleted = 1
